Normal Attacks.name: Standing Light Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: In February 27, 2024 patch: hurtbox sizes increased on frames 2-8 but decreased on frames 9-11.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Limited Juggle State on anti-air hit and on Punish Counter (Knockdown +49)

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Medium Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: 20% damage scaling to followup combo hits.

Unique Attacks.name: Run > Forward + Punch (Backup)
Unique Attacks.notes: Projectile invincibile once first hit lands, continuing into second hit. Second hit only comes out if the first connects. Second hit can canel into Supers as of May 2024 patch. As of December 2024 patch: 20% initial scaling.

Unique Attacks.name: Run > Forward + Kick (Tempest Moon)
Unique Attacks.notes: Air Current changes data, listed in brackets.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Medium Punch (Flapping Spin)
Unique Attacks.notes: Limited Juggle Potential on first hit, second hit forces air reset. Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Heavy Punch (Break Assault)
Unique Attacks.notes: Air Current makes Rashid fly forward with this attack.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Heavy Kick (Crescent Kick)
Unique Attacks.notes: Hurtbox rises up from the bottom before active frames. Air Current makes Rashid fly forward with this attack.

Unique Attacks.name: Run (Forward, Hold Forward)
Unique Attacks.notes: Rashid's Forward Dash can be held to initiate Run and continue running, simply hold the second Forward input after pressing Forward > Forward to dash. Run can be cancelled by holding Back or Down-Back.Rashid's Forward Dash is 18 frames, but run doesn't activate until frame 20.

Unique Attacks.name: Side Flip (Forward + KK)
Unique Attacks.notes: Rashid will flip forward and can hop through standing opponents / over grounded opponents. 32 total frames.

Unique Attacks.name: Front Flip (Side Flip > KK)
Unique Attacks.notes: Rashid will Jump after the side flip. Can control range with Back+KK (shortest), KK (middle), or Forward+KK (farthest), this direction obeys Rashid's original starting position, so if he crosses the opponent up the Front Flip direction affect distance as they would have before he crossed them up. Can perform any Jump attack out of the Front Flip.

Jump Attacks.name: Wall Jump
Jump Attacks.notes: Can wall jump by jumping into a wall/the edge of the screen, then presing press Up+Away from the wall/edge of screen.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Medium Punch
Jump Attacks.notes: Limited Juggle State on air hit.

Jump Attacks.name: Jump Heavy Punch
Jump Attacks.notes: First hit is Limited Juggle State on air hit, but second hit forces knockdown on air hit.

Jump Attacks.name: Forward Jump, Down + Heavy Punch (Blitz Strike)
Jump Attacks.notes: Jumps off the opponent's head on hit or on block, which then allows Rashid to perform any Jump attack after. The in-game frame meter's hit/block data assumes Rashid empty lands, so on-hit, he's actually incredibly advantaged in terms of when he can act. So much so that, in the corner where he doesn't travel away due to hitting the wall, on-hit he can combo Blitz Strike into every jumping attack from even the earliest Blitz Strike hit. On-block in the corner, he's around -9...-12. Forced knockdown on air hit.

Jump Attacks.name: Neutral Jump, Up + Heavy Kick (Aerial Shot)
Jump Attacks.notes: Limited Juggle State on air hit.

Special Moves.name: Spinning Mixer (Light Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Whiff has 5 frames longer recovery. Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack, data in bracket.

Special Moves.name: Spinning Mixer (Medium Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 6-14. Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack, data in bracket. Crouch block causes last hit to whiff, resulting in another -4 advantage. March 2026 patch: adjusted anti-air invincible frames to 6-14 and adjusted hurtbox (normal version only)

Special Moves.name: Spinning Mixer (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 5-11. Air Current makes Rashid fly more upward with this attack, data in bracket.

Special Moves.name: Spinning Mixer (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8[1-6]. Air Current makes Rashid fly more upward with this attack, data in bracket. Air Current version can cancel into Arabian Skyhigh on hit. In February 27, 2024 patch: anti-air invincibility added to third hit's active frames. As of December 2024 patch: knockdown on hit changed from +22[+47] to +9[+42].

Special Moves.name: Eagle Spike (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack, data in bracket. Forced 55 frame Block animation prevents any potential for variable meaty on-block advantage. Can cancel into Level 3 Super after landing on the ground (on hit only, as of the May 2024 patch).

Special Moves.name: Eagle Spike (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack, data in bracket. Forced 55 frame Block animation prevents any potential for variable meaty on-block advantage.

Special Moves.name: Eagle Spike (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack, data in bracket. Forced 55 frame Block animation prevents any potential for variable meaty on-block advantage.

Special Moves.name: Eagle Spike (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Air Current makes Rashid fly far forward with this attack, data in bracket. Forced 55 frame Block animation prevents any potential for variable meaty on-block advantage.

Special Moves.name: Whirlwind Shot
Special Moves.notes: Cannot be used during Ysaar (Level 2 Super). Can hold to charge a second and third projectile, based on hold length. Kick strength changes the trajectory: Heavy Kick is the shortest, then Medium Kick is farther, then Light Kick farther again, then Overdrive is the farthest and does not rise. Overdrive can only charge one level, data is in brackets. Fully charged Whirlwind Shot creates an Air Current on the ground at Rashid's position for 1 second. As of March 2026 patch: held OD version can now be cancelled into WingStroke/Rolling Assault at frame 54.

Special Moves.name: Arabian Cyclone (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Limited Juggle State on hit. Creates an Air Current on the ground at Rashid's position for 1 second.

Special Moves.name: Wing Stroke
Special Moves.notes: Considered a jump/can use any jump attack from frame 31 onward. 67 frames total if no jump attack is used.

Special Moves.name: Rolling Assault
Special Moves.notes: Upper Body projectile invincible on frames 5-30.

Special Moves.name: Nail Assault
Special Moves.notes: Upper Body invincible on frames 1-19. Limited Juggle State on hit.

Special Moves.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Leg projectile invincibility on frames 1-21. Limited Juggle State on hit. Can use jump attacks afterward.

Special Moves.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Leg projectile invincibility on frames 1-26. Limited Juggle State on hit. Can use jump attacks afterward.

Special Moves.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Leg projectile invincibility on frames 1-29. Limited Juggle State on hit. Can use jump attacks afterward.

Special Moves.name: Arabian Skyhigh (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Leg projectile invincibility on frames 1-21. Limited Juggle State on hit, but transitions into a forced dive kick followup.

Super Arts.name: Super Rashid Kick (Level 1)
Super Arts.notes: Strike/throw invincible on frames 1-15. Breaks armor. Grounded (early) hit does 2100, late (anti-air or juggle) hit does 1800. As of December 2024 patch: knockdown +11 to +1 on grounded hits.

Super Arts.name: Ysaar (Level 2)
Super Arts.notes: Breaks armor. Spawns a slow moving tornado that moves across the screen, an Air Current travels just behind the tornado while active. Limited Juggle State on hit. Counts as a Super projectile, so regular and Overdrive projectiles get eaten by it.

Super Arts.name: Altair (Level 3)
Super Arts.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-15. Breaks armor. Critical Art in parenthesis.
